description.value:
Trigger A Large or larger creature within your melee reach is hit by a melee attack from one of your allies.

You have become accustomed to dealing with creatures much larger than you, and you know very well how to use their size against them. The triggering creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|options:damaging-effect,inflicts:prone] save against the higher of your class or spell DC. On a failure, the creature falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone] and takes @Damage[(max(floor(@actor.level/2),1))[bludgeoning]] damage equal to half your level.
